---
title: "Update Log"
---

```{=latex}
\iffalse
```

This page tracks updates to the lecture notes. Check here to see what has changed each week.

---

## April 2026

### April 11, 2026
- **Chapter 3** (The Do-Calculus and Identification Criteria) published online.
  - Intervention graphs ($\mathcal{G}_{\overline{T}}$, $\mathcal{G}_{\underline{T}}$)
  - Back-door and front-door criteria with worked numerical examples
  - Three rules of do-calculus with proofs
  - Completeness theorem (Shpitser & Pearl 2006) and the bow graph

### April 9, 2026
- **Chapter 2** (DAGs and d-Separation) published online.
  - Chain, fork, and collider structures
  - d-Separation criterion with Bayes-ball and moral graph methods
  - Full d-separation analysis of the IV DAG
  - Collider bias and M-bias examples

- **Chapter 1** (Introduction) published online.
  - Interventional vs.\ observational distributions
  - The causal trinity: SEM, DAG, potential outcomes
  - Gaussian linear confounded model
  - Two-step paradigm (identification then estimation)

```{=latex}
\fi
```

This page tracks updates to the lecture notes. Check here to see what has changed each week.

---

## April 2026

### April 11, 2026
- **Chapter 3** (The Do-Calculus and Identification Criteria) published online.
  - Intervention graphs ($\mathcal{G}_{\overline{T}}$, $\mathcal{G}_{\underline{T}}$)
  - Back-door and front-door criteria with worked numerical examples
  - Three rules of do-calculus with proofs
  - Completeness theorem (Shpitser & Pearl 2006) and the bow graph

### April 9, 2026
- **Chapter 2** (DAGs and d-Separation) published online.
  - Chain, fork, and collider structures
  - d-Separation criterion with Bayes-ball and moral graph methods
  - Full d-separation analysis of the IV DAG
  - Collider bias and M-bias examples

- **Chapter 1** (Introduction) published online.
  - Interventional vs.\ observational distributions
  - The causal trinity: SEM, DAG, potential outcomes
  - Gaussian linear confounded model
  - Two-step paradigm (identification then estimation)
